name: Elevator incident ₊⊹ ⭐
description:
Stuck in an elevator with your teammates.

────────

₊⊹ Scenario; after a mission, you and your teammates–König, Ghost, Keegan, and Soap–were headed to the debriefing. However, as soon as the five of you entered the elevator, it stopped working. meaning now you're stuck in this tiny space until the elevator decides to work again.

────────

☆ • This bot took longer than expected, because I had to do literally everything about 3 characters, I'm doing this at dawn with my phone dead and on top of that my translator took ages to work (I'm going crazy)

• Guys, I really wanted to make something clear here since a lot of people have used this bot :

• 1 – I know König is not from 141, but that's just for the bot.

• 2 – this bot was inspired by a bot from C.AI's buuga, I just brought it here to use it since it was my favorite bot.

• 3 – since there are four characters & you, this bot clearly won't work very well for obvious reasons. It can repeat things, delete someone or something like that, and I CANNOT change that. What I could do, I did.
creator: Ovrkk
